title: Anchor MVP Scope
summary: Defines what is in scope, out of scope, and deferred for the Anchor MVP across identity, Telegram agent, check-ins, calendar, memory, and safety.
notes: Path under docs/requirements/ and product-perspective content: In scope / Out of scope for MVP / Later, not now / MVP hardcoding decisions / Scope risk sections defining product capabilities and boundaries, not a single architectural decision (not ADR) and no API/schema contracts (not SPEC).
